Description:


Wooden Dog Stairs/Steps


Product Functions:

Our wooden dog stairs offer a practical and user - friendly solution for your furry companions. With 4 levels, these pet stairs provide a safe and gentle incline for dogs and cats to access beds and cars effortlessly. The combination of stairs and a ramp gives your pet options based on their comfort. The foldable design makes it incredibly convenient for storage and transportation, allowing you to take it along on vacations or move it from one room to another. It's suitable for pets up to 110 pounds, accommodating a wide variety of breeds.

Product Details:

  • Construction: Crafted from high - quality wood, these pet stairs are built to last. The 4 - level structure ensures a smooth ascent and descent for your pet.
  • Ramp: The ramp is carefully designed with a smooth surface to ensure a seamless transition for your pet.
  • Foldable Mechanism: Easily fold and unfold the stairs in seconds. When folded, it takes up minimal space, making it ideal for storage in closets or car trunks.
  • Weight Limit: With a generous weight capacity of up to 110 pounds, it can handle the weight of most medium to large - sized pets.
  • Seller's Strength:
  • We are a leading provider of pet products with a strong reputation. Our dedicated R & D team focuses on creating pet - friendly designs that prioritize the safety and comfort of your pets. We use only the finest materials and conduct rigorous quality checks at every stage of production. Our customer service is second to none, always ready to assist you with any questions or concerns. We have a long list of satisfied customers who have benefited from our reliable and durable pet stairs, and we continue to strive for excellence in the pet product market.
